---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
```{=html}
<section id="wine-intro">

<style>

/* ---------- GLOBAL ---------- */

#wine-intro{
  margin:50px auto;
  max-width:1100px;
}


/* ---------- HERO SECTION ---------- */

.wine-hero{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:28px;
  padding:28px;
  border-radius:20px;

  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffffff,#f5ecf7);

  box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  transition:.3s;
}

.wine-hero:hover{
  transform:translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow:0 18px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.15);
}

.wine-logo img{
  width:110px;
}

.wine-text h1{
  margin:0;
  font-size:2rem;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#5A0F4D;
}

.wine-text p{
  font-size:1.05rem;
  line-height:1.7;
  margin-top:8px;
  color:#3E0736;
}

.wine-text strong{
  color:#7B2C6F;
}


/* ---------- TILE GRID ---------- */

.tiles{
  margin-top:50px;

  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));
  gap:28px;
}


/* ---------- TILE CARD ---------- */

.tile{
  border-radius:16px;
  overflow:hidden;
  text-decoration:none;
  background:#fff;

  box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.08);

  transition:.35s;
  position:relative;
}

.tile:hover{
  transform:translateY(-8px);
  box-shadow:0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
}


/* ---------- TILE IMAGE ---------- */

.tile img{
  width:100%;
  height:160px;
  object-fit:cover;

  transition:.35s;
}

.tile:hover img{
  transform:scale(1.08);
}


/* ---------- TILE BODY ---------- */

.tile-body{
  padding:18px;
  text-align:center;
}

.tile-title{
  font-size:1.05rem;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#2d2f36;
  margin-bottom:6px;
}

.tile-sub{
  font-size:.85rem;
  color:#6b7280;
}


/* ---------- BADGES ---------- */

.tile.live::before{
  content:"Live";
  position:absolute;
  top:12px;
  left:12px;

  background:#5A0F4D;
  color:#fff;

  font-size:11px;
  padding:5px 10px;
  border-radius:20px;
}

.tile.completed{
  opacity:.75;
}

.tile.completed::before{
  content:"Completed";
  position:absolute;
  top:12px;
  left:12px;

  background:#9ca3af;
  color:white;

  font-size:11px;
  padding:5px 10px;
  border-radius:20px;
}


/* ---------- DARK MODE ---------- */

.quarto-dark .wine-hero{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1f2937,#111827);
}

.quarto-dark .wine-text p{
  color:#d1d5db;
}

.quarto-dark .tile{
  background:#1f2937;
}

.quarto-dark .tile-title{
  color:#f3f4f6;
}

.quarto-dark .tile-sub{
  color:#9ca3af;
}

</style>


<!-- HERO -->

<div class="wine-hero">

<div class="wine-logo">

<img src="https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/raisins-2025.firebasestorage.app/o/Training%2Fwinelogo.webp?alt=media">

</div>

<div class="wine-text">

<h1>WINE Learning Platform</h1>

<p>
<strong>WINE (Web-based Interactive Network for Education)</strong> is a modern
learning hub developed by <strong>Statoberry LLP</strong> in association with the
<strong>Department of Agricultural Statistics, KAU</strong>.
</p>

<p>
It integrates training modules, exercises, lecture materials and interactive
resources so that learners can <strong>revisit, practise, and master data science concepts anytime</strong>.
</p>

<p>
Designed for <strong>students, researchers, and professionals</strong>, WINE makes
learning <em>interactive, engaging, and accessible</em>.
</p>

</div>

</div>



<!-- TRAINING TILES -->

<div class="tiles">


<!-- ACTIVE TRAINING -->

<a href="wineapps/multivariate.qmd" class="tile live">

<img src="https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/fig-1-41cec.firebasestorage.app/o/WINE%2Ftmarch_2026%2Fdata_banner.webp?alt=media">

<div class="tile-body">

<h3 class="tile-title">
Multivariate Techniques in Agriculture
</h3>

<p class="tile-sub">
March 2026
</p>

</div>

</a>



<!-- COMPLETED -->

<a href="#" class="tile completed">

<img src="https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/fig-1-41cec.firebasestorage.app/o/WINE%2Ftdec2025%2Fnextgen.webp?alt=media">

<div class="tile-body">

<h3 class="tile-title">
Next-Gen Data Analysis with R and AI-Powered RAISINS
</h3>

<p class="tile-sub">
December 2025
</p>

</div>

</a>



<!-- COMPLETED -->

<a href="#" class="tile completed">

<img src="https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/fig-1-41cec.firebasestorage.app/o/WINE%2Ftnov2025%2Fdatasciencefoundation.webp?alt=media">

<div class="tile-body">

<h3 class="tile-title">
Data Science Foundation in R
</h3>

<p class="tile-sub">
November 2025
</p>

</div>

</a>



<!-- COMPLETED -->

<a href="#" class="tile completed">

<img src="https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/fig-1-41cec.firebasestorage.app/o/WINE%2Ftesp2025%2Ftitlecard.webp?alt=media">

<div class="tile-body">

<h3 class="tile-title">
Next-Gen Data Analysis with R and AI-Powered RAISINS
</h3>

<p class="tile-sub">
September 2025
</p>

</div>

</a>


</div>

</section>
```
